reviews.review_title: The fastest way to a meeting
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed how easy it was to create a room and simple to invite others. I think lots of potential for this app. We are a team of 5 from different countries and are now using this for our weekly stand ups, the fact that I can reserve a room for a meeting later is awesome. It just works, super quick and simple meetings + the functionalities are useful, like I can quickly project my Google drive presentation and probably hands down the best whiteboard experience in VR. Really looking forward to see how this app grows further! And the team was super friendly when we had questions. Give this a go go go! Nok!
NokNok is easy to adopt and use. I started using it for our remote team meetings and daily standups, it’s great!

reviews.review_title: Recommended for a try with friends!
reviews.review_description:
My friend sent me an invite link, then I joined their room immediately without any registration required. It's so awesome. 
Similar to Zoom meeting with random room number, but in VR.
